title: Virtual Thread Basics
description: What is the main advantage of virtual threads over platform threads?
question: What is the main advantage of virtual threads over platform threads?
options: They use less memory and allow millions of concurrent threads
They replace the need for databases
explanation: Virtual threads are lightweight threads managed by the JVM rather than the OS. They use significantly less memory than platform threads (often just a few hundred bytes of stack vs. 1MB+), enabling applications to create millions of concurrent threads. They do not speed up CPU-bound work or automatically parallelize code.
